findings.description: The note that the DB2 DataSource progressiveStreaming=2 configuration is the architect's responsibility and individual developers do not need to perform it is omitted.
findings.source_evidence: 「なお、この設定はアーキテクトが行うものであり、各開発者が行う必要はありません。」(BLOBサイズが小さい場合のセクション)

findings.description: The note that the ResultSetConvertor implementation is the architect's responsibility and individual developers do not need to perform it is omitted.
findings.source_evidence: 「ResultSetConvertorの実装はアーキテクトが行うものであり、各開発者が行う必要はありません。」

findings.description: PascalCase class names `SqlRow` and `Blob` appear in the Java code examples in the section content but are absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source code examples use `SqlRow row = rows.getRow();` and `Blob blobColumn = (Blob) row.get("blob_column");`
